name: Taufeeq Ur Rehman
title: Web Developer & Pentester
about: Results-driven Web Developer with 1 year of hands-on experience building responsive websites and web applications. Proficient in WordPress, Shopify, PHP, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. Combines a Cyber Security background with development skills to build websites that are not only visually appealing but also secure and performance-optimized. Quick learner, detail-oriented, and passionate about clean code.
aboutBullets: Designed and developed responsive websites for clients using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP.
Built and customized WordPress websites including themes, plugins, and WooCommerce integrations.
Developed Shopify storefronts with custom theme edits, product pages, and payment setup.
Ensured websites followed OWASP security guidelines to prevent common vulnerabilities.
Collaborated directly with clients to gather requirements and deliver projects on time.
Optimized website performance and loading speed for better user experience and SEO ranking.
Used AI and Prompt Engineering tools to speed up development workflows and content generation.

experience.title: Freelance Web Developer
experience.description: Building secure, responsive websites and web applications for clients globally.

projects.title: Web Security Scanner
projects.description: A penetration testing tool that scans web applications for common vulnerabilities including XSS, SQL Injection, CSRF, and OWASP Top 10 threats. Built with Python and a web-based dashboard.

projects.title: E-Commerce Websites
projects.description: Developed multiple fully functional e-commerce storefronts on WordPress/WooCommerce and Shopify with custom themes, payment gateways, and secure checkout flows.
